name: General Tso's Chicken 2
recipeIngredient: 1 1-inch piece gingerroot, peeled and finely chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. In a glass bowl, place chicken pieces.
2. Combine 3 tablespoons soy sauce and 1 tablespoon cornstarch in a separate bowl.
3. Blend in beaten egg white.
4. Pour the mixture over the chicken and toss to coat well.
5. Marinate in the refrigerator for 1 hour.
6. In a small bowl, combine remaining soy sauce, vinegar, white wine, and 1 teaspoon cornstarch; mix until smooth.
7. Stir in sugar, sesame oil, and salt.
8. Heat vegetable oil in a wok.
9. Deep-fry chicken, a few pieces at a time, about 1 minute, or until golden brown.
10. Remove and drain on paper towels.
11. Pour all but 2 tablespoons oil out of the wok.
12. To the wok, add chili peppers, garlic, and ginger; stir-fry for 1 minute.
13. Pour sauce mixture into the wok and cook, stirring, about 1 minute, until thickened.
14. Return chicken pieces to the wok.
15. Mix well and serve immediately.
I like to serve this with rice and Sauteed Snow Peas and Red Peppers. The chicken is spicy hot due to the dried chili peppers, so adjust to your taste. Enjoy!
